title: webdriverio@4.4.0 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.4.0.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.4.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 112 commits . - [`51913cc`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/51913cc98a377ad9b411f7c589c809c6f5d1434d) v4.4.0 - [`544466d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/544466dbb4f1fbd8534f584e4fae714262573d66) Update contributors - [`157f1c4`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/157f1c4bef58625cded5dbd65ba2cb65b83f45ed) quarantine test as it is failing on Travis - [`65d2c2f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/65d2c2f6ec93006342e3f363448250ef6cce5b2b) updated changelog - [`accd941`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/accd9410fb39fcce0f87c09cdcfe06478d6962d3) minor wordings on main page - [`c665ace`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c665ace4d96533f9e098a35110e18110dc79a415) update startpage demo - [`16f127e`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/16f127ecafa19657de61dce56eca9cd999fab1ff) update examples using $ and 11247 functions now - [`9ebe815`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/9ebe815d42f50d9177b6d8051e78ba036aed9054) ignore js files in root folder - [`dfbd873`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/dfbd873f74daf2ae891a44eb260884ebda4a30cd) add $ and 11247 API methods to chain element commands - [`aa1d027`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/aa1d027b1894cf44db676d6d4b68b960abf5e8e1) add integration tests for new element methods - [`51d6f79`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/51d6f796e1a9dbc4eb8b95a0ccb74f40bce624b8) provide helper methods ($ and 83734) to fetch elements and execute on them easier - [`663f3b5`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/663f3b54da3866d3c422c443afded318da502ae3) Merge pull request #1693 from Algram/master - [`5d0877f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/5d0877f2037e6b223007efabacc48b00c61c5266) Fixed wrong link to Selenium Documentation - [`2f2317d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/2f2317d6d3099b631766621bf7e11750050ab1f1) another build fix - [`137efb0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/137efb09eb18a1eb0415f46d661a01ec627cbd28) Merge pull request #1680 from nason/patch-1 There are 112 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/d14d392773d42d000ac0255a41d30ddf6dd0fd59...51913cc98a377ad9b411f7c589c809c6f5d1434d). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
